name: Sallen-Key Active Filter
description: Second-order Sallen-Key unity-gain low-pass active filter using an ideal op-amp. Demonstrates frequency-domain optimization with clear, measurable cutoff and Q metrics.

parameters.name: C1
parameters.label: Feedback Capacitor C1
parameters.description: Feedback capacitor from output to node A

parameters.name: C2
parameters.label: Shunt Capacitor C2
parameters.description: Capacitor from op-amp input to ground

metrics.name: Cutoff_Freq_Hz
metrics.label: Cutoff Frequency (-3dB)
metrics.description: Frequency at which gain drops 3dB below passband

metrics.name: Q_factor
metrics.label: Quality Factor
metrics.description: Quality factor - 0.707 for Butterworth (maximally flat), higher for peaking

supply.comment: Ideal op-amp, no explicit supply rails

design_constraints.name: Q_stability
design_constraints.description: Very high Q causes peaking and potential instability with real op-amps

design_constraints.name: Q_minimum
design_constraints.description: Very low Q indicates overdamped response with poor selectivity

design_constraints.name: frequency_range
design_constraints.description: Cutoff frequency should be within practical audio/RF range

overdamped.description: Severely overdamped - response may be too sluggish

underdamped.description: Highly underdamped - excessive peaking near cutoff
